programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Una visita del pasado de Joe amenaza su reciente conexión con Cameron. Mientras Donna está fuera de la ciudad, el volumen de trabajo comienza a pasarle factura a Gordon.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Mutiny, la joven compañía de juegos de Cameron y Donna, se encuentra en una encrucijada, mientras que Joe y Gordon se vuelven a ver con motivo de la venta de Cardiff.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Tras reunirse con el padre de Sara, Joe comienza un nuevo trabajo. Gordon se enfrenta a su nueva libertad mientras Donna es pillada desprevenida por el sorprendente contrato de Cameron en Mutiny.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Mientras Bosworth intenta retomar su vida anterior, los Clark reciben una sorprendente invitación. Un problema interno en Mutiny amenaza su supervivencia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La situación entre Jawy y Potro es cada vez más tensa. Las nuevas se lanzan topless de la tirolesa. Nacha confronta a Isa, mientras que Jawy decide que la playa es el lugar perfecto para aclarar las cosas con Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía llega de sorpresa y los lleva de fiesta. Nacha va al hospital. Chile por fin corona con Isa. Los Shores tienen una sesión con Silvia Olmedo; Karime vuelve con Ramiro y trae ganas de trío. Entre Fer e Isa hay pleito de celos por Chile.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores se preparan para el fin de la aventura en Mazatlán. Los invitados llegan a celebrar la fiesta final. Potro y Tadeo aparecen cuando ya está el pleno desmadre y un incidente entre las mujeres de Chile está a punto de explotar.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final termina en pleito entre el harén de Chile. Mane le prepara a Jawy una ceremonia sorpresa para ratificar su amor. Los Shores se van de la casa, pero Karime y Potro dejan lo mejor para el final.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylin se abre con los Shores y les cuenta su historia. El grupo se relaja en un beach club pero los problemas siguen. Jaylin y Capitán discuten y la situación entre Nacha y Jacky se sale de control.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores vuelven a la casa en autobús y lo que parecía que iba a ser un viaje relajado y divertido, se convierte en un todos contra todos. El Boss se presenta oficialmente y un nuevo integrante llega.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El Team Tendo le organiza una fiesta de 15 a su Matrioska y los Shores se entregan al festejo como solo ellos saben hacerlo. Todo es diversión hasta que una discusión inesperada excede todos los límites.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The tension between Jawy and Potro continues to rise. The newcomers go topless on the zip line. Nacha confronts Isa, while Jawy decides that the beach is the perfect place to sort things out with Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía arrives by surprise and takes them partying. Nacha is rushed to the hospital. Chile Finally kisses Isa . The shores have a very provocative session with Sexologist Silvia Olmedo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: On the Fury Planet, a land where everyone is quick to pick a fight, Tetsuro slams into a tofu vendor as an assassin who works for Duke Mech, a friend of Count Mecha, targets him.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: The gang encounters the space warrior Edmond inside of the 999. His hometown, “Sweet, Sweet Planet” is shaped like an apple that has had bites taken out of it.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Ulatres, a planet that specializes in screws. There, a woman named Lasen takes a liking to Tetsuro and imprisons him in the hopes of them living together.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Plated City, a planet where people are considered poor if they aren't plated in gold. There, Maetel has her suitcase stolen by Wheel Lock, a young boy who wants to get plated.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999 Series
programme.desc: Wheel Lock's mother is against the tradition of plating and is trying to form a resistance. As her dying wish, she asks Wheel Lock to continue the fight against gold plating.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel Brigade's original purpose was to discover lost technology, but they end up doing household duties.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: On this day, the Angel Brigade is supposed to welcome their newest member but Forte and Ranpha have gone on a vacation to a casino.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel Brigade has been assigned to sort trash. They have been told that there is a Lost Technology buried in the trash.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel Brigade has been sent to protect the president of a company. Ranpha is initially excited because the president looks cute but is astonished when the president actually turns out to be an old man.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: In request of Duke Crizeman, Milfeulle and Ranpha are sent to return his student ID card to an abandoned school in Area Enigma, a dangerous area that is said to be infested with pirates.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: In this episode, Forte, Milfeulle, and Normad are to find lost technology on a planet. Milfeulle finds an egg and tries to cook it but the egg wouldn't crack. The strange egg then hatches and a mouse comes out.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Mint, Vanilla, and Milfeulle are sent to Chickendee Planet to find and catch the kidnappers who have been kidnapping children. Everyone dresses up in costumes and tries to find who the kidnappers are.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: A commander and his helper have come to the Angel Base hoping to find lost technology thinking that the Angel Brigade found many and hid them secretly in their base.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels board a derelict spaceship to look for the lost technology. The spaceship is apparently haunted as ghosts appear from nowhere and chase them around.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: A misdelivered package arrives at the doorstep of a love-crazed Ranpha who has recently lost her former boyfriend Melty Way. It turns out to be an android lover from the Full Monty Company.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: In an Old West-style town, Forte and Vanilla have been dispatched to search for Lost Technology. Forte and Vanilla both split their own ways with Vanilla working for the doctor of the local clinic.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels play a baseball game against the men from the Transbaal Navy. Due to Colonel Volcott's drunken stupor and a bet he made with the Admiral, they have to win the game or else they must wear negligees and be conscripted into the Navy if they lose.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Mint and Ranpha were kidnapped during a mission and the kidnappers demand a large ransom in return. Unable to pay off the ransom, Forte and Milfeulle devise a plan to get the money by faking another kidnapping incident with Colonel Volcott.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte befriends a juvenile delinquent girl named Milly who was the daughter of a crime boss. She tries to cheat out of paying for food before Forte sees her gun and notes something strange about Milly.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Vanilla allegedly loses a valuable item that she was carrying with her at all times. As a result, she has fasted for two weeks and hasn't eaten a bite since then. Unless the mysterious item can be found, Vanilla won't break her fast and will die.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte comes back after a long mission, only to find that everyone believes she is dead! Apparently, Ranpha used Forte's "death" as an excuse for missing her date with a guy she likes, letting the situation go out of hand.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels' new mission is capturing a runaway sentient tank. Milfeulle and Mint get on the tank as it rampages in the city. Has the sentient tank developed feelings of friendship for the two girls? Can the Angels successfully stop it?

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Forte destroys her engine after pushing it too hard without breaking it in. Forte, Mint, and Vanilla find the nearest space station in an attempt to try to get Forte's engine repaired.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Lucky Milfeulle wins a free dinner at a fancy restaurant and brings Normad along as a date to teach her table manners. On the way there, they chance upon a pastry stall and Milfeulle is impressed with the delicious pastries.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The military plane that Mint and Forte were traveling in crashes, stranding them on a deserted island. Mint and Forte team up with the island's sole resident Max to find ways to call for help.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: Ranpha, Mint, and Vanilla go to a pizzeria that is open in late-night hours. However, the pizzeria is unexpectedly closed. Ranpha does not believe it and sneaks in.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: During the search for the lost technology, Mint gets stuck in a cutboard figure on top of the mountain viewing area. Meanwhile the mountain is sinking into the sea.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are approached by Mr. God, a retired comedian who tries to make Vanilla laugh. He failed to do so in his last show despite everyone else laughing, resulting in an accident.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The human race is being attacked by its mysterious arch-enemy, a giant dice named Kyutaro. As the Angels try to attack Kyutaro, the dice is invulnerable to any human attack and easily defeats the Angels.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angels are filing their expense reports when the Commander informs them that the Milfeulle who has been with them all this time is a fake.

programme.title: Galaxy Angel
programme.desc: The Angel's (last) mission is escorting the mysterious client Johnny in a truck through a desert wilderness. As each Angel takes turns to drive, Ranpha becomes jealous as she loses to other Angels in deciding who goes next.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip as experts Charlie Ross and Christina Trevanion hit the road in a VW Campervan. Charlie gets into the kilt-wearing spirit as they kick off in Inverness, Scotland and head south towards auction in Bo'ness.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip through Scotland, Charlie Ross comes face to face with the penguins of Edinburgh Zoo and Christina Trevanion dares to step onto the top of the iconic Forth Rail Bridge.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Charlie Ross travel through northeast England on the third leg of their road trip. After his last success at auction, Charlie is feeling flush but can Christina catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in York, Christina Trevanion and Charlie Ross head to auction in Bourne, as Charlie learns of a simple invention that changed British roads forever and Christina hears the story behind the 400-year-old hand of a Catholic Saint.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Christina Trevanion and Charlie Ross begin the final day of their road trip in Spalding, before heading toward Boston. Christina has been closing in on Charlie's lead but who will win as they go head-to-head at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper embark upon the first leg of their brand-new road trip. The experts kick off in Penzance and make their way through scenic Cornwall before going head-to-head at an auction in Liskeard.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the second leg of the road trip for antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper. After a disheartening first auction, Margie has a lot of catching up to do. But will her fortunes change as the expert head for an auction in Exeter?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper kick off the third leg of their road trip in Chippenham. Margie learns about the beginnings of modern photography and Paul learns the fascinating history of Farleigh Hungerford Castle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After a very successful auction, antique experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper kick off leg four of their road trip in South Wales and make their way across the country for a penultimate auction showdown in Llandeilo.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper begin the last day of their trip together in Newport, South Wales before heading to Newent. Paul is in the lead, but Margie is snapping at his heels. Who will win as they go head-to-head at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new road trip with Thomas Plant and Anita Manning. The experts are touring the country in a yellow Lotus and their first leg sees them start in Hertfordshire and work their way towards an auction in Banbury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On day two of their trip, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning travel around the southwest of England. Thomas learns about one of the UK's great inventing families, and Anita finds out how a mistake on a map resulted in the naming of America.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning are embarking on the third leg of their road trip. Thomas is leading the charge after his success in the last auction, but can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in South Somerset, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning head towards auction in Wimborne, Dorset. Anita learns about a prehistoric man at Cheddar Gorge and Thomas hears about one man's pioneering fight to forecast the weather.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Birmingham and find a Victorian painting, a telescope, an early 19th-century wooden ark, and a small pottery Turk's head, which turns out to be the most valuable piece of English pottery ever found at a Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts are at Cliveden in Buckinghamshire to examine a valuable collection of jewelry found in a rubbish tip, a Stanley Spencer sketch of the owner's father, a brooch, and a silver beaker. Michael also makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts return to Cliveden's gardens in Buckinghamshire and discover a ladies bureau, an 'eccentrically large' barometer, an unusual 'McMickey' Mouse, and a silver cruet set made by one of the great silversmiths, worth £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts travel north to Lochgilphead in Argyll and Bute. Among the finds are a valuable painting, a pair of Staffordshire zebras, a painting of a young girl by Scottish artist Hamilton McKenzie, and a carved bone ship.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael takes the experts to Salford near Manchester and discovers an album full of valuable photographs, Zulu wedding beads accompanied by some rare photos, an American scrimshaw whale's tooth, and a drawing by the local artist LS Lowry.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are at the turrets and terraces of Eastnor Castle in Herefordshire, where they find some bizarre objects including a wooden bicycle, a huge pocket knife, an embroidered egg, a World War I pack, and the first All Blacks rugby shirt.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team return to Eastnor Castle in Herefordshire with expert Paul Atterbury. Exciting finds include a 17th-century wine bottle, suffragette memorabilia, a bust of General Gordon, and a much-loved Victorian dressing case.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Eston, Cleveland, where they find a sculpted elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi, a Victorian painting, the first commercially produced toy robot, a collection of craft jewelry, and a fiber-glass chair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Melksham, Wiltshire. Among the items are a Cossack dagger, a drawing by Edmund Dulac, a dog collar made in 1784, and a collection of bedpans and a gold box found in the mud in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Caernarfon in North Wales and examine a stunning 17th-century lantern clock, a set of chairs, a jade necklace, and a 200-year-old bleeding bowl.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Rugby, Warwickshire, where the finds include a collection of suffragette material, a signed Rolling Stones album, a post box from Penny Lane in Liverpool, and a Turkish rifle with Greek inscriptions.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and Paul Atterbury return to London's Victoria and Albert Museum to showcase previously unseen sequences from other roadshows, including a collection of Winston Churchill mementos, and an album of Spanish watercolors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Forde Abbey in Somerset, where the finds include a second-century cameo ring, two ebony busts, and a reflecting telescope worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In the last program of the series, Michael Aspel and the experts return to Forde Abbey in Somerset, where the finds include a decorative sword from the American Civil War.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Bourbon Street to help the owner of Turtle Bay figure out how to make his bar stand out in one of the most popular drinking districts in the world.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon needs the nice-guy owner of Champagne's Cafe, a classic Vegas dive with a storied Mafia history, to start acting like a wise guy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Despite initial success, the owner of Longshots lost control of his feuding bar staff and may soon lose his house if Jon can't turn things around.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer tries to help a struggling married couple save their karaoke bar in downtown Las Vegas and get their goals to start a family back on track.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After getting out of the service, Navy vet Barry decided to buy an Ohio biker bar, but his lack of experience and the bar's prior reputation force him to call Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help a retired baseball player turned bar owner who struck out when he hired a boozy staff content to waste the bar's profits.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the failing owner of Baseline Sports Bar, whose sexually exploitive spaghetti wrestling events have driven away female customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A riverside bar in Florida is struggling to stay afloat due to a manager with no experience, a staff co-mingling, and a wildly out of line menu for their community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A failing beachfront bar is shut down after rodents invade the kitchen, and Jon is brought to tears by what the owners have endured.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: He's no stranger to unkempt bars, but Jon is absolutely disgusted by the rat, roach, and raccoon problem inside Freaki Tiki.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Brother and sister owners develop a bitter sibling rivalry when they take over the historic Sam Jordan's bar in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A third-generation Milwaukee bar owner takes his father's legacy for granted and refuses to take on the inherited mantle of leadership.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Carrie rescues a spearfisherman who starts obsessively stalking her. Sean, Jason, and Zack save her from his deadly pursuit, but can Carrie feel safe saving strangers again? Sean is jealous of Sam dating Leigh, but Leigh has doubts about Sam.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Baywatch faces two bizarre lawsuits. Kekoa’s father wants her to break up with JD and quit lifeguarding. Zack runs the new Junior Lifeguards program. A government Investigation puts Sean’s job and the future of the Training Center in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: A hurricane hits Hawaii. Sean and Jenna get trapped in a WWII bunker and must put their hatred aside and work together to escape. Zack is trapped in headquarters with a thrill-seeking reporter that puts their lives in danger to get her story.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Jenna invests all her money with an investment banker who turns out to be a con man. Derek Hart is the kind of man JD wishes he was. But when Derek jumps off a cliff, JD and Jason dive in to save his life, in more ways than one!

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Zack corrupts the headquarters’ computer system forcing everyone to work in the Dark Ages. Sean is freaked because a major donor is about to arrive in the midst of chaos. Jason saves Brit from her ex.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Kekoa is devastated when Jessie tells JD that he’s the father of her child. A rescued bodyboarder is paralyzed. Sean has a romantic encounter with a beautiful, woman he thinks might really be Pele, the goddess fire.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Investigating toxic dumping, Sean and Leigh end up chained inside a chamber slowly filling with toxic seawater. Can Sam get them out in time? To raise money, Jason and Zack have to hula dance in grass skirts in front of a lot of women.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Leigh takes over at Baywatch while Sean, Jason, and Zack go to compete in a 12-mile race of natural obstacles. Jessie’s presence at the race creates turmoil. Leigh and Jenna pretend to be lesbian lovers.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: For a rescue, Sean is awarded a free week at Hilton Hawaiian Village, which he declines. Zack pretends he’s Sean and enjoys all the freebies until Sean shows up! A pretty fashion photographer thinks Jason has top model potential.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Sean has a decision – move to Australia or stay in Hawaii. Zack sees Leigh naked, leading to complications with her fiancé Sam. Kekoa dumps JD and becomes a party girl. When Sam leaves Leigh at the altar, Sean asks Leigh to marry him instead.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Thackerville as John Salter and Chidi Njokuani face off in a pivotal middleweight showdown.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator crosses the Atlantic to bring viewers an action-packed card from Genoa, Italy! The main event sees hometown hero and Italian superstar Alessio Sakara take on Kent Kauppinen in a matchup of light heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Hawaii with the long awaited rematch between Brent Primus and (Iron) Michael Chandler for the Lightweight World Title. Also on the card is a showdown between heavyweight legend Frank Mir and knockout artist Javy (Eye Candy) Ayala.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Live from Hawaii, women’s Flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane puts her title on the line against Valérie Létourneau . In the co-main event, Lyoto Machida makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight king Rafael Carvalho.

programme.title: Bellator 214: Fedor vs Bader
programme.desc: A new Heavyweight champion will be crowned in the Bellator MMA cage when the last emperor Fedor Emelianenko takes on Ryan Bader in the finals of Bellator Heavyweight Grand Prix. Plus, pro wrestling superstar Jake Hager makes his long-awaited MMA debut.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Mohegan Sun Arena as two giants collide in the Bellator cage when all American Matt Mitrione takes on Russian knock-out artist Sergei Kharitonov in the Heavyweight main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena with a Quarter Final bout in the Welterweight World Gran Prix as undefeated Michael Page takes on Paul Daley. In the Co-Main Event, Mirko Cro Cop makes his Bellator MMA debut against Roy Nelson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Emmanuel Sanchez returns to the cage after his hard-fought run toward the title vs a featherweight rematch Georgi Karakhanyan.

programme.title: Bellator 219: Awad vs Girtz
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Temecula, California with a lightweight clash between Brandon Girtz and Saad Awad that promises fireworks. Also, former welterweight champ Andrey Koreshkov, and former featherweight champ Daniel Straus makes his long-awaited return.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Courtney who says former friend Amie fabricated several pregnancies and baby deaths. Dr. Phil asks Amie why there are no death records of her deceased children. Why did Amie walk off stage and explosively meltdown backstage? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany & Sheka aren't alone in accusations ex-boyfriend Erik lies & scams constantly. Dr. Phil talks to ex-girlfriends Torri & Courtney & ex-wife, Martha, all sharing in Erik's deceitful behavior. Erik's revealed as an alleged con man--will he change?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shines a light on domestic violence speaking with Kaitlyn, defending her pro-fighter husband, Josh, while he's being held in jail without bail. And hear Trichelle, facing 20 years in prison after she says she killed her husband in self-defense.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he can't choose between his wife, Michele, and his girlfriend, who's calling herself "Sarah" to protect her identity. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: People, eager to give opinions, can lose an entire career with just one tweet. Kathy won Miss Michigan 2019 but lost the crown the next day because of comments she made on social media.Plus, Carissa's transphobic posts derailed her dreams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Crystal accuses her ex-boyfriend, Anthony, of sexually assaulting their 3-year-old daughter. Crystal says she has proof confirming Anthony as the monster she says he is. Anthony says Crystal is “crazy and a liar.” Can Dr. Phil expose the truth? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather says husband Anthony put rubbing alcohol in her contact lens case, which he denies. Anthony says he does have anger issues after returning from Iraq & admits to abuse of Heather's dog. Robin McGraw issues a strong warning about domestic violence.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Child abductions are a reality, & friends, neighbors & even relatives can kidnap your youngster. Two victims share heart-wrenching stories of abduction & how they were returned to their families. Find out what you need to know to keep your child safe!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rachel says she hates her mother, Aundrea, who is an embarrassment, and who stole her childhood due to her alcoholism & a pill addiction. Aundrea admits she's an alcoholic and a liar, & says she is keeping two dark and embarrassing secrets.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shemida says she has been diagnosed with more than 70 medical and mental health conditions and prescribed more than 80 medications over a 10-year span. Her sister, Dana, believes Shemida fabricates her issues for attention. Is Shemida really sick? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After 21 years, Paula is considering divorcing husband, Jeremy, saying he's "clueless, absent & non-verbal." Jeremy says it's Paula--controlling & a grudge-holder. Find out Jeremy's mistake. Dr. Phil and Robin share the secret to their 45-year marriage.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with actress Katherine Heiglabout the return of "Firefly Lane" and more.Plus, inan all-new Drew's News, Katherine Heigl joinsDrew and Ross Mathewsat the news desk to hit the headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder, Drew is surprising a deserving nurse and retired postal worker who founded a local chapter of non-profit to help underserved communities receive free or low-cost medical care.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Remi Cruz is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some delicious fried mac n' cheese bites. The world's oldest female comedian Dionne Forest is doing a hilarious stand-up set.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Gwen Stefani opens up to Drew about motherhood, her new music, working alongside husband Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is taking on a New Jersey pizza tour. Plus, some viewers go head-to-head in a pizza competition with Chef Joe Isidori. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the news desk to cover today's biggest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Martha Stewart stops by to whip up brioche and apple bread pudding, dishes on her thirst traps, the one person she's desperate to meet and shares why she has decided to open-up her Bedford home and gardens in her new shows.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross are joined by beauty guru Zanna Roberts Rassi at the news desk to break down the latest beauty headlines. Then, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Zanna transforms a busy mom of two and special needs teacher.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Property Brothers are joining Drew as co-hosts for the entire show! Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Jonathan and Drew Scott at the news desk for Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Last Thing He Told Me" star Jennifer Garner is getting a big birthday surprise from Drew.

programme.desc: Louisa's hippie mother Eleanor arrives in the village, immediately taking over Martin's kitchen to prepare a herbal tonic, which she later gives to the baby to stop his crying.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is shocked by the unexpected arrival of his ex-wife Maggie, who appears to have forgotten that they separated years ago and wants to know why he left her.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Bert Large's restaurant business is in financial trouble: he can't even afford the food and drink for a charity event to raise money for Florence Dingle's cat sanctuary.

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar saves a woman from thieves in Paris, then must bargain among several parties claiming ownership of paintings in her possession.

programme.title: Wycliffe

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A man reports his wife's disappearance to the police, but Wycliffe is not entirely convinced he is being truthful.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los guardias de la prisión en Virginia interceptan un paquete de pruebas relacionadas con el secuestro de dos niños hace varios años, la UAC interroga a un famoso asesino serial que puede tener información sobre el paradero de los niños.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se sorprende cuando Hotch es arrestado por un equipo SWAT y por sospecha de conspiración, mientras el equipo se apresura a demostrar su inocencia, sospechan que se avecina un complot mayor.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Juego de niños
programme.desc: El trabajo diurno de un marine muerto en un laboratorio de ideas del gobierno lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a la vida de un niño prodigio de 12 años que puede ser el próximo objetivo del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sigue la pista a un recluso fugitivo que cose la boca a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sospecha que un par de asesinos trabajan juntos, después de destapar dos cuerpos aparentemente no relacionados entre sí.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany warns Lyle that Mattie won't reciprocate his feelings, Walt helps Mattie see Lyle in a new light, and Tiffany yearns for ways to quell her sexual frustration.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Mattie goes on a date with Jason, Tiffany's hormones boil out of control (and Walt finds himself on the receiving end of it), and Mattie's alter ego Martha makes a reappearance.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The ladies stage an intervention to discuss Mattie's belligerent behavior when she drinks, Walt pranks the girls and they retaliate, and the gang says goodbye.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast sits down with host Christine Lakin to relive the craziest, drunkest, and most dramatic moments from the party house, including some never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Christine Lakin chats with the cast to set the record straight about the best and worst moments they experienced in the party house.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: This season the cast packs their bags to raise some hell in one of the wildest party towns in the south, Athens, Georgia. Their first night, emotions run high, and the clothes come off, leaving the roommates with their wildest night yet.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The guys tease Daddy, Taylor reveals mind-altering information, and Lyle insults Tiffany, so she uses his face as a punching bag.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin begins season four with eight hardcore athletes going head to head in three rounds of grueling competition. The winner will have to beat the returning champion's benchmark time in order to walk away with $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight elite level women to compete on his ranch. But only one will get a shot at the new Skullbuster and chance to beat returning champion Cassidy's benchmark time and earn the $10,000 prize.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin puts eight heavyweights through three rounds of competition in Drag Race, Trucked Up, and The Crate. One competitor will take on the Skullbuster for a chance at $10,000, but only if he can beat the benchmark time.

programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight female athletes to his ranch to go head-to-head in Drag Race, Trucked Up, and The Crate. Only one will stand tall in the end and take on Steve's Skullbuster for a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: With $10,000 up for grabs, eight badass women go head to head in Rip Off, Stoned, and Pole Dancer to decide who takes on Steve Austin's Skullbuster.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight fine-tuned athletes arrive at Steve Austin's ranch to compete in Snatch, High & Dry, and Rock Climb. One will emerge and earn a shot at Steve's Skullbuster and $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito en la lámpara maravillosa

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito detectives

programme.title: El circo de Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina viaja a Monterrey para trabajar en un circo y ayudar a su sobrina a recuperar un terreno que ha heredado, el cual esconde un tesoro enterrado por un coronel revolucionario.

programme.title: El Sargento Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina quiere convertirse en superhéroe para combatir el crimen. Se enlista en la policía y después de un riguroso entrenamiento llega a ser sargento y confronta a los criminales en una serie de cómicos incidentes.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: La loca
programme.desc: Un joven psiquiatra se interesa en el caso de una paciente que cree vivir en el año 1936. Los parientes de ella quieren hacerla pasar por sana para poder cobrar una herencia, pero el médico lucha contra toda la familia para defender a 'La loca'.

programme.title: Juana Gallo
programme.desc: La verdadera historia de Angela Ramos una joven campesina que llegó a ser la cabeza de una guerrilla que lucho exitosa-mente contra las fuerzas federales del usurpador Victoriano Huerta. El pueblo la llamó por su fiereza “Juana Gallo”.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Desierto
programme.desc: A group of people trying to cross the border from Mexico into the United States encounter a racist man who has taken border patrol duties into his own hands.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: Tierra Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando una derrota en el ring deja a Lion y a su hermano y mánager, Stan, en deuda con un jefe criminal, todos se ven obligados arriesgarlo todo en un torneo de boxeo a puño limpio mientras luchan por una vida mejor.

programme.title: Leyendas de vida
programme.desc: La leyenda de Bagger Vance cuenta la historia de Rannulph Junuh. Su encuentro con Bagger Vance, que se convierte en algo más que un entrenador, llegando a ser un verdadero life coach, es clave para recuperar la confianza en sus capacidades.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: Pasión por el triunfo
programme.desc: Doug es un jugador de hockey sobre hielo, pero sus sueños se truncan por un accidente que da fin a su carrera. Kate es una patinadora artística, quien elitista la fuerza a patinar sola. Juntos, el improbable dúo va por el oro olímpico.

programme.title: Por un puñado de besos
programme.desc: Una chica, un chico en una historia de amor, pero también sobre los sueños, los miedos, la vida, el amor verdadero, la amistad, la forma en que lo afrontamos y un secreto entre los dos…

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: 30,000 leguas de viaje submarino
programme.desc: En este recuento moderno del clásico cuento de ciencia ficción, el carismático sicópata capitán Nemo, utiliza su submarino de alta tecnología para provocar su venganza en el mundo de la superficie.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Abre los ojos
programme.desc: César es un casanova exitoso enamorado de la belleza Sophia (Penélope Cruz), pero una ex celosa lo involucra en un accidente que le destruye la cara.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Busco novio para mi mujer
programme.desc: Arath de la Torre y Sandra Echeverría protagonizan una comedia sobre el plan de un esposo para poner fin a su infeliz matrimonio, para descubrir que incluso los mejores planes pueden resultar contraproducentes cuando se trata de amor.

programme.title: Divina confusión
programme.desc: Comedia mexicana llena de estrellas donde el amor de hoy en día recibe un empujoncito por parte de poderes de lo más alto.

programme.title: El Inca (LAS)
programme.desc: Una trágica historia de amor basada en la vida del dos veces campeón mundial de boxeo venezolano Edwin "el Inca" Valero.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que asesinó a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que asesinó a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: Evolución
programme.desc: Un recluta de bombero, dos profesores universitarios, y la geek científica enviada por el gobierno, luchan contra un organismo alienígena que ha evolucionado rápidamente desde que llegó a la tierra dentro de un meteorito.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: Jay y el silencioso Bob
programme.desc: Hollywood adapta el cómic "Bluntman y Chronic" a la gran pantalla sin el permiso de los íconos drogadictos reales de DEPENDIENTES: Jay y Bob el Silencioso.

programme.title: Enchufe sin visa
programme.desc: Una divertida comedia de seis latinos que viajan a Estados Unidos y pronto se verán inmersos en las situaciones más ridículas y vergonzosas. Desde un estudiante de intercambio, a una ingenua actriz, cada uno vivirá peripecias inesperadas.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de Lecter Corp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: Un romántico funeral
programme.desc: Nada como la muerte para ponerle romance a la vida: La suerte de un desafortunado de 25 años cambia cuando es el portador del féretro de alguien que no conoce. David Schwimmer, Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned-revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Indiscreet
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: The Grass Is Greener
programme.desc: Victor and Hillary are down on their luck to the point that they allow tourists to take guided tours of their castle. But when a millionaire oil tycoon, visits, and takes a liking to more than the house, they soon get involved in a love triangle.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Yours, Mine, and Ours
programme.desc: When widowed nurse Helen North (Lucille Ball) meets widower Frank Beardsley (Henry Fonda), a population explosion takes place as her eight kids blend (or don't) with his ten in this chaotic, classic comedy! Van Johnson and Tom Bosley co-star.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

programme.title: Indiscreet
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: The Grass Is Greener
programme.desc: Victor and Hillary are down on their luck to the point that they allow tourists to take guided tours of their castle. But when a millionaire oil tycoon, visits, and takes a liking to more than the house, they soon get involved in a love triangle.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer goes home to Mayberry and becomes involved in the search for a bank robber.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, la agente de bienes raíces de Texas Sarah Anne Walker fue brutalmente asesinada en una casa modelo. Semanas después, se presentó un testigo que pudo haber visto al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la noche de Halloween de 2004, Adriane Insogna y Leslie Mazzara fueron brutalmente asesinadas en su casa de Napa, California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will climb up 4 stories on a hook and ladder with 70 pounds of gear. Contestant must lay in a pit for 2 minutes while scorpions are dropped on them. Contestants will be put on a platform suspended from a crane 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants fall out of a speeding helicopter. Contestant must consume 10 live slugs and a shot of cow bile. Each contestant must cross between two buildings by placing three planks in front of them on top of two tight ropes as they walk.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be placed on a 20 foot rope ladder. Contestants play a game to determine quantity of food they will have to eat. Contestant must walk across a 12 inch wide and 60 foot long beam suspended 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt, the contestant will be placed on a 30 foot truss structure. Contestant moves electric eels from one side of tank to the other. In this stunt, the contestant will be seated on a barrel hung by 20 foot long cables underneath a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass cabinet. One person retrieves roaches using only their mouth and transfers it to their partner's mouth, who in turn drops it into another bin. In this stunt, it will be a husband and wife team.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants stand in front of a long table with 13 holes. Contestant enters a cylindrical glass tank filled with water and then dead frozen mice are dumped in. The contestant will be standing on a large plexiglass platform in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Joe Rogan, in a crowd of fans, counts down the top 15 stunts from all the shows up till this point.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. In a Plexiglas coffin and covered with leeches. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will each be suspended from their own crane. Player is placed inside a sealed Plexiglas coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: En este estreno de temporada de dos horas, doce chefs comienzan su viaje hacia el premio final: un puesto de chef ejecutivo en el recientemente inaugurado Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de una desastrosa noche de apertura, ambos equipos aprenden la importancia del servicio en un restaurante: servir mesas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Frustrado después de otro mediocre servicio en la cena, el chef Ramsay comparte algunas de sus experiencias dirigiendo un exitoso restaurante mientras prepara la competencia de la tercera noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pone fin a la batalla de los sexos y "Hell's Kitchen" abre nuevos caminos cuando los equipos cocinan para un grupo especialmente exigente: los niños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: El quinto día comienza con el chef Ramsay dando una lección a los concursantes restantes sobre el arte del sabor culinario.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.desc: Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: The Ricardos get settled in their country home after all those years in a New York apartment and immediately begin to miss their old friends, Fred and Ethel. Lucy and Ricky decide to surprise the Mertzes with a visit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
